name: Euroz Hartleys Group Limited
analysis: EZL has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 11% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.2800, stop A$1.0890, target A$1.4400 (0.84:1) — then trail it.
